title: Nexus Dimension
description: Teleportation done right. A reimagining of the Nether Hub.
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/929a9881bd6e65aa43e2e346f03d6805605c50ce.png)
# **Enter The Nexus**: A dimension that warps space to make **traveling long distances easier**.

In vanilla and especially multiplayer, players tend to build **Nether Hubs** to travel far distances. Because, for every block traveled in the Nether, it would be 8 in the Overworld. **The Nexus** mod takes this idea and expands upon it.

Depending on the type of **Nexus Portal Core** you place in **The Nexus**, you can essentially **multiply the coordinates** that you'll end up at in the outside dimension.

The graph below demonstrates this functionality. Below, we have 32 blocks in the Overworld, but by placing an **Iron Nexus Portal Core** in **The Nexus**, only 4 blocks will need to be traveled to end up 32 blocks on the outside (Overworld).

![Demonstration](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cb2eaa704133f74e49fa7cd0b881d8ba12d9a0ba.png)

The Nexus is a peaceful and relatively flat dimension, making it a breeze to create roadways and structures.

![Nexus Dimension](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b58e5e4d10d1d023c0fba7720ded48318e35a15c_0.webp)

Portals can be constructed of any color, size, and shape!

![Portal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f2b587ea943a1bbefcdc74e43e3183feebb92d75_0.webp)
